backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no defined methods or state, serving as a placeholder entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the invite code field and its validation logic were removed from the teacher registration flow, affecting AuthContext.tsx and LoginPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role in the EduTrack Pro application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the EduTrack Pro app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that seeds demo data, wraps the app in AuthProvider, and conditionally renders LoginPage or the authenticated Layout with page routing.
frontend/src/components/attendance/Atten: Displays attendance summary KPI cards (present, absent, percentage) and a Recharts pie chart visualizing present vs. absent counts.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Attend: Renders a Recharts bar chart comparing daily present and absent counts, with an empty-state message when no data is available.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ExamPe: Renders a Recharts pie chart of exam grade distribution (A, B, C, Fail) with color coding and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/KPICar: Reusable animated KPI card component displaying a title, value, optional subtitle, and a colored icon in one of four color themes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Top navigation header showing the current page title, user role badge, display name, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper composing the Sidebar, Header, and a scrollable main content area for authenticated pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: Left navigation sidebar with the EduTrack Pro logo, user info, page navigation links, and a dark mode toggle button.
frontend/src/components/midtermExam/Rank: Renders a ranked table of students with their total marks, percentage, and color-coded grade badges, showing medal emojis for the top 3 ranks.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: Component that conditionally renders its children only when the authenticated user's role matches one of the allowed roles.
frontend/src/components/students/AddStud: A dialog modal form for adding a new student with fields for name, roll number, class, and parent contact, including validation and submission via the useStudents hook.
frontend/src/components/students/EditStu: A dialog modal form for editing an existing student's details, pre-populated from the selected student and saved via the useStudents hook.
frontend/src/components/students/Student: Displays a student's name, roll number, class, and parent contact in a card layout, with edit and delete action buttons visible only to teachers via RoleGuard.
frontend/src/components/weeklyTest/Stude: Renders a single student row in a weekly test list, showing the student's name and either an editable number input (for teachers) or a read-only mark display, with a trophy icon for the topper.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context supporting login, logout, and teacher registration, checking against hardcoded demo accounts and localStorage-persisted registered teachers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Manages attendance records in localStorage, providing functions to save attendance by date, retrieve records, and calculate daily and overall attendance summaries.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkMode.ts: Manages dark mode state persisted in localStorage, toggling the 'dark' class on the document root element when the mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDashboardData.ts: Aggregates dashboard statistics (total students, attendance percentage, weekly average, midterm average, and a 7-day attendance trend) by composing data from the students, attendance, weekly test, and midterm exam hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useMidtermExam.ts: Manages midterm exam data in localStorage, providing functions to save exams, calculate per-student results with grades, generate a ranked list, and compute the class average percentage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file noting that the app uses localStorage instead of a backend; exports nothing meaningful.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudents.ts: Manages the student list in localStorage, exposing add, update, delete, and refresh operations with React state synchronization.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeeklyTest.ts: Manages weekly test records in localStorage, supporting creation, mark updates, deletion, per-test summary calculation, and an overall weekly mark average.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a navy-blue/white CSS custom-property theme for light and dark modes, and declares fade/slide animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttendancePage.tsx: Attendance management page that lets teachers mark students present/absent for a selected date, save records, view a summary, and export a text report.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying KPI cards (students, attendance, weekly/midterm averages), attendance and exam performance charts, quick action buttons, and a welcome banner with the logged-in user's info.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page supporting both login and teacher registration views, with form validation, error/success messaging, and calls to AuthContext's login and registerTeacher methods.
frontend/src/pages/MidtermExamPage.tsx: Midterm exam management page allowing teachers to enter and save per-subject marks for each student, with tabs for data entry and a rank list view showing grades, class average, and top student.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page showing the logged-in user's details, role badge, contact/qualification info, and a permissions list that differs based on whether the user is a teacher or principal.
frontend/src/pages/StudentsPage.tsx: Student directory page with search and roll-number filtering, a responsive grid of StudentCards, and role-guarded controls for adding, editing, and deleting students via modals and a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyTestPage.tsx: React page for managing weekly test marks, allowing teachers to add tests by subject, enter/update per-student marks, and view a summary with class average and topper. Uses role-based guards to restrict add/delete actions to teachers only.
frontend/src/types/attendance.ts: TypeScript type definitions for attendance, including AttendanceStatus, AttendanceRecord (per student per date), and AttendanceSummary (aggregated stats for a date).
frontend/src/types/auth.ts: TypeScript type definitions for authentication, defining Role, User (with username, role, displayName, classSection), and AuthState.
frontend/src/types/midtermExam.ts: TypeScript type definitions for midterm exams, covering SubjectMark, MidtermExam, Grade, MidtermResult, and RankListEntry used for rank-list analysis.
frontend/src/types/student.ts: TypeScript interface defining the Student entity with id, name, rollNumber, class, and parentContact fields.
frontend/src/types/weeklyTest.ts: TypeScript type definitions for weekly tests, including StudentMark, WeeklyTest, and WeeklyTestSummary (class average, topper info).
frontend/src/utils/storage.ts: localStorage utility module providing generic get/set/remove helpers, storage key constants, and functions to seed and persist sample students, attendance, weekly tests, midterm exams, and registered teachers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy and edu-accent color scales, CSS variable-based semantic colors, custom border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for EduTrack Pro describing version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for a school ERP app with role-based access, CRUD, attendance, weekly tests, midterm exams, and localStorage persistence.
